span.p:
CHECKER
did it do what
the task asked?

div.style: color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
REVIEWER
is it good code?
a different model

div.style: color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
a fresh, throwaway
copy of your repo

div.style: color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MAKER
writes the code, in a sandbox

div.style: color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
did it touch only
its own workspace?

div.style: color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
OUTER RING · your tests
do they pass?

div.style: color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 237, 224) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
tests pass AND
both reviewers approve?

div.style: color: rgb(10, 6, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
the centre
commit to a branch, stop
